label: 1526 CE
era_summary: Year 1526 (MDXXVI) was a common year starting on Monday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1526: Pope, Venice, Florence-emperor, Spain 1526-28; France, Venice, England, Genoa (till June 1528)-emperor, Spain, Genoa, 1526-30; Papal States (Colonna revolt), 1526. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1526: Spain-Honduras, 1524-26; Pope, Venice, Florence-emperor, Spain 1526-28; France, Venice, England, Genoa (till June 1528)-emperor, Spain, Genoa, 1526-30. Maddison records GDP/capita 1294 (ESP, 1526) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
